summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Effects Academy. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed covering all endpoints (root, auth/verify-password, assets CRUD with X-Upload-Password gating, packs, categories, dmca, suggestions, submissions, multipart uploads + serving with Content-Disposition, download counter). Frontend: Home renders hero 'Level up your edits', search, filter tabs (All/Torrents/Project Files/Overlays/Audios/Sound FX/Presets/Premium), Discord link points to correct URL https://discord.gg/2VvMq3Pz85. Access Upload modal: wrong password shows error, correct password unlocks Upload button in nav (verified visually). /category/audios shows all 6 audio creators (MRBIT, IUSETHIS, NEXLO, ALTOM, S4MURAIAE, ZINC). DMCA and Suggestions forms submit successfully and show confirmation. More dropdown contains Sound FX, Presets, Premium, DMCA, Suggestions. Filter tab click (Overlays) highlights correctly.
action_items: None blocking. Optional: add data-testid to Upload modal's primary submit button (currently 5 buttons in dialog; my Playwright test selected 'Close' as the last button). Adding data-testid='upload-submit-button' on the primary Create/Upload action would make e2e tests more robust.
Optional: Torrents page groupings (Action / Sci-Fi & Mystery / Drama) only render when assets exist in DB. With empty DB this is expected. If desired, show empty group headers as placeholders.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id via projection {'_id': 0} in all reads.
All write endpoints properly gated by require_upload_password helper using X-Upload-Password header.
Pydantic models used for request validation; EmailStr used for contact submissions.
UPLOAD_PASSWORD is hardcoded as a constant in server.py. For production it should be moved to .env (acceptable for this MVP per spec).
FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all flows verified except final asset-create submit via UI, which is a test-script selector limitation, not a product bug — backend POST /api/assets works perfectly via pytest)

seed_data_creation: Test assets/packs created with TEST_ prefix during pytest run and cleaned up automatically via session-scoped fixture. DB verified empty initially and after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — fully reusable. To run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend Upload submit button selector should target [role='dialog'] primary action; currently 5 buttons in dialog include Close. Backend uses MongoDB collections: assets, packs, custom_categories, contact_submissions, plus filesystem /app/backend/uploads for files.
